## What does this PR do?

A short description of the change and **why** it's needed. Link any related
issue (e.g. "Closes #12").

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New ecosystem / parser
- [ ] New registry (update checks)
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Other:

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added or updated for the change
- [ ] `pytest` passes locally
- [ ] No third-party runtime dependencies were added
- [ ] Docs updated if behavior or options changed
